channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: First global map reveals the vast underground fungal network supporting Earth’s ecosystems
item.description: A new international study has produced the first global map of the planet’s underground mycorrhizal fungal network, revealing an astonishingly large and complex system that plays a crucial role in sus...

item.title: Moozlie Mabena's Ndebele Cultural Statement at Durban July
item.description: Moozlie Mabena made a striking fashion statement at the Hollywoodbets Durban July by embracing Ndebele cultural heritage. The event, themed 'country allure,' saw many attendees opt for cowboy-inspired...

item.title: BKTC constitutes four-member inquiry committee to investigate alleged irregularities in Badrinath Temple donations
item.description: The Badrinath-Kedarnath Temple Committee (BKTC) has constituted a four-member inquiry committee to investigate allegations of irregularities in the handling of donations and offerings at Shri Badrinat...

item.title: GOP Lawmaker Condemns Mike Johnson's Leadership Failures
item.description: The article details how a prominent GOP lawmaker, Jared Holt, has publicly criticized Mike Johnson, a Republican leader, for his perceived failures in managing party dynamics and addressing internal c...

item.title: Morogoro residents, police and security agencies strengthen cooperation to preserve peace and public safety
item.description: Morogoro Region has continued to experience a peaceful and stable environment, allowing residents, traders and business owners to carry on with their normal daily economic activities without disruptio...

item.title: Open’er Festival 2026 showcases JENNIE, Addison Rae, Jade, and PinkPantheress in electrifying music collaborations
item.description: The article details the high-energy performances at Open’er Festival 2026, highlighting JENNIE’s solo set featuring unreleased tracks, Addison Rae’s dynamic pop spectacle, Jade’s genre-blending solo w...

item.title: Eswari Gunasagar condemns AI-generated fake images and online harassment incident
item.description: Singaporean actress Eswari Gunasagar has publicly addressed a distressing incident involving AI-generated fake images of herself circulating online. The manipulated content depicted her with a man at ...

item.title: Inuk Man Sentenced to 33 Months for Assaulting Uncle with Metal Bar
item.description: A Quebec judge has sentenced Timothy Assapa, a 34-year-old Inuk man, to 33 months in prison for assaulting his uncle, Sajuilie Assapa, with a metal bar in 2025. The attack left the uncle with severe h...

item.title: Victor Asiwe's Achievements at Stanford University
item.description: Victor Asiwe, a 27-year-old actuary, has graduated in the top 1% of his MBA class at Stanford University's Graduate School of Business, one of the world's top-ranked business schools. Born in Nigeria ...

item.title: Partial water restoration in Ratanda following service delivery protests and unrest
item.description: Gauteng Premier Panyaza Lesufi confirmed that water has been partially restored to Ratanda, with lower-lying areas receiving supply while higher-lying regions face delays. The restoration comes after ...

item.title: No Winners in Major Lotto Draws on July 5, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) reported no winners for its major lotto games on Sunday, July 5, 2026. The Ultra Lotto 6/58 jackpot remained at P128,000,000 with the winning combinati...

item.title: Kindle Scribe Colorsoft's Purpose Explored
item.description: The article discusses the Kindle Scribe Colorsoft, a device designed for note-taking and reading. It highlights its features such as color display, handwriting recognition, and integration with Amazon...

item.title: Taxi Collision with SUV and Sedan Causes Overturn in Pasig City
item.description: A taxi overturned following a collision with an SUV and a sedan in Pasig City, according to a report by ABS-CBN News. The incident occurred on July 5, 2026, and involved multiple vehicles. While the e...

item.title: Enugu Government trains public officers on anti-corruption compliance, accountability and financial regulations
item.description: Governor Peter Mbah of Enugu State has called on political appointees and civil servants to fully embrace transparency, accountability and traceability as the guiding principles of public service. Spe...

item.title: Tragic Incident: 63-Year-Old Man Killed by Falling Tree During Mumbai Rainstorm
item.description: A 63-year-old man, Yunus Kundawala, died on Sunday afternoon after a tree uprooted by heavy rain and strong winds crashed onto his two-wheeler in Mumbai’s Kurla West. The incident occurred near the BM...

item.title: Casa Bonita workers continue labour dispute over wages and workplace safety with support from Brooke Shields
item.description: Workers at Casa Bonita, the Colorado restaurant owned by South Park creators Trey Parker and Matt Stone, are continuing a labour dispute centred on workplace safety, wages and contract negotiations. T...

item.title: Armed clashes in Balochistan result in casualties among tribesmen and a young girl
item.description: In Balochistan's Qila Abdullah and Dera Bugti districts, two separate armed clashes resulted in the deaths of eight tribesmen and a young girl. The first incident occurred when armed men attacked a gr...

item.title: APC factions clash over candidate replacement in Ondo
item.description: The article reports a violent clash between supporters of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Ondo State over the replacement of senatorial and House of Representatives candidates selected for the ...

item.title: Trump's SAVE Act Faces Senate Resistance as Midterm Elections Loom
item.description: President Donald Trump's controversial voter identification bill, the SAVE Act, continues to stall in the Senate as his administration faces mounting criticism. The proposed legislation, which require...

item.title: Pakistan allocates Rs1.6 billion to modernise weather forecasting and disaster preparedness systems under Annual Plan 2026-27
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has allocated Rs1.6 billion to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) under the Annual Plan 2026-27 to improve weather forecasting, strengthen early warning systems an...
